name: bd-browse
description: better-dev's vendored cut of gstack's browse/ - persistent localhost Chromium daemon for agent-driven browser checks. Upstream: garrytan/gstack (MIT), see UPSTREAM and LICENSE-upstream.

scripts.build: bun build --compile --external sharp --external chromium-bidi src/cli.ts --outfile dist/browse && git rev-parse HEAD > dist/.version && chmod +x dist/browse
scripts.check: bun build --target=bun --external sharp --external chromium-bidi src/cli.ts src/server.ts --outdir /tmp/bd-browse-check
